testcase.name: aiVideo.generateStoryboard — happy path (5 scenes) > returns historyId, jobIds(length=5), scenesPlaceholder(length=5) · history scenes 5 all sceneImageUrl=null
aiVideo.generateStoryboard — rate limit > 11th call throws TOO_MANY_REQUESTS (AC-4)
aiVideo.generateStoryboard — zod validation > scenesCount=9 → BAD_REQUEST (镜头数应在 5-8 之间)
aiVideo.generateStoryboard — zod validation > scenesCount=4 → BAD_REQUEST (镜头数应在 5-8 之间)
aiVideo.generateStoryboard — zod validation > scenesCount=5 → pass (AC-11 boundary)
aiVideo.generateStoryboard — zod validation > scenesCount=8 → pass (AC-11 boundary)
aiVideo.generateStoryboard — isFallback=true (agent post-validate retry) > agent isFallback=true (Chinese in imagePromptEn triggered fallback) → router still creates history + queues jobs
aiVideo.generateStoryboard — cross-account RLS isolation > findFirst null (accountId mismatch blocked by RLS) → INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
aiVideo.jobStatus — returns correct status counts > returns total=5 completed=3 pending=1 failed=1 from stored scenes
aiVideo.jobStatus — returns correct status counts > NOT_FOUND when historyId does not belong to account
US-007 AC-10: aiVideo flow integration — queue mock + real DB > generateStoryboard: 5 scenes → 5 jobs queued · history written to real DB · jobStatus returns completed=5 after worker mock
US-007 AC-10: aiVideo flow integration — queue mock + real DB > cross-account jobStatus: different accountId → NOT_FOUND
